name: Diagnostic Preparation Pack
summary: Prepare a structured pre-visit brief from chart and imaging context.
clinical_goal: Reduce physician preparation time before an encounter.

inputs.name: patient_context
inputs.description: Patient demographics and identifiers required to anchor the workflow.

inputs.name: encounter_context
inputs.description: Current encounter or appointment context for the requesting clinician.

inputs.name: recent_imaging_index
inputs.description: Recent imaging references used to assemble the diagnostic preparation pack.

outputs.name: physician_brief
outputs.description: Structured pre-visit brief for clinician review.

target_mappings.notes: Internal shell artifact used before any EHR filing.

outputs.name: document_reference_draft
outputs.description: Draft report artifact that could later map to a FHIR DocumentReference.

target_mappings.notes: Draft only in Week 1; write-back remains disabled.

review.notes: No report may be filed or exported without physician approval.

failure_policies.condition: No patient identifier or launch context is available.
failure_policies.action: Stop the workflow and request context instead of guessing.

failure_policies.condition: FHIR or imaging index is unavailable.
failure_policies.action: Return a partial briefing with missing-data flags and keep status in_review.
